Filter.Value: (FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc01='on' AND AIMode01='continuous'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc01='on' AND AIMode01='single'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc02='on' AND AIMode02='continuous'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc02='on' AND AIMode02='single'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc03='on' AND AIMode03='continuous'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc03='on' AND AIMode03='single'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc04='on' AND AIMode04='continuous'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc04='on' AND AIMode04='single'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc01='on' AND AISamplesSource01='cyclic'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc02='on' AND AISamplesSource02='cyclic'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc03='on' AND AISamplesSource03='cyclic'
(FunctionModel='FastMaster' or FunctionModel='SlowMaster') AND AICalc04='on' AND AISamplesSource04='cyclic'
IS_RUNTIME='1' AND (FunctionModel='Standard' or FunctionModel='FastMaster') AND FlatStreamActivate='on'
IS_RUNTIME='1' AND (FunctionModel='Standard' or FunctionModel='FastMaster') AND FlatStreamActivate='on'
NOT (ARIOMasterBus='CANIO') AND ( StatusInfo='on' OR (PowerInfo='on' AND IS_RUNTIME='1'))
